Open Climate Resilience Policies

OCRP is an open source library of model policies designed to reduce climate-related losses for governments at all levels.

About the Project

Climate change poses unprecedented challenges to communities worldwide. The Open Climate Resilience Policies project provides government officials, policymakers, and community leaders with tested, adaptable policy frameworks to address climate hazards and build resilience.

Our Approach

Each policy in the OCRP library includes:

  • Clear implementation guidelines
  • Applicability to different government levels
  • Fiscal impact assessments
  • Evidence-based best practices

Get Started

Explore our policy library to find resilience solutions tailored to your community's needs.
